WITN08690100
WITN08690100

Witness Name: Glyn Allan Burrows
Statement No.: WITN08690100
Dated: 11 October 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF GLYN ALLAN BURROWS

I, Glyn Allan Burrows will say as follows:

Introduction

1. I am a former employee of Post Office Ltd.

2. This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry (the "Inquiry") with the matters set out in the Rule 9 Request dated 23 August 2023 (the "Request").

3. I can confirm I was assisted by the Post Office in confirming insurance coverage for support in preparing my statement. I have also been assisted by DAC Beachcroft LLP in the preparation and drafting of my statement.

Background

Page 1 of 35
